##NAMES=Taniajacoite
##RRUFFID=R140945
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=SrCaMn^3+^_2_Si_4_O_11_(OH)_4_·2H_2_O
##LOCALITY=N'Chwaning III mine, Kalahari manganese field, Northern Cape Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Jaco and Tania Janse van Nieuwenhuizen
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of radiating acicular  brown crystals, associated with pink sugilite and dark-red lipuite. Type sample.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140945
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Sr(Ca_0.81_Sr_0.19_)(Mn^3+^_1.90_Fe^3+^_0.15_Al_0.01_)Si_3.96_O_11_(OH)_4_·2H_2_O
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.1365 b: 6.2567 c: 12.0045 alpha: 90.019 beta: 91.641 gamma: 89.899 volume: 686.03 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
